message:
fix: normalize categories in recommendations and honor JFP_HOME in credentials

Fixes case-sensitivity issues in the recommendation engine and improves
CLI state isolation for testing.

Recommendation engine fixes (packages/core/src/search/recommendations.ts):
- Add normalizeCategory() helper for consistent lowercase/trimmed categories
- Normalize categories when building signal weights
- Normalize preference categories before boosting
- Normalize excludeCategories filter for proper matching
- Normalize candidate categories during filtering

This ensures "Coding" and "coding" are treated identically, preventing
missed recommendations or incorrect exclusions.

Credentials path fix (packages/cli/src/lib/credentials.ts):
- Honor JFP_HOME environment variable for credentials path resolution
- Matches existing behavior in config.ts for consistency
- Enables isolated CLI state during E2E tests by setting JFP_HOME

Test updates:
- metadata-assistant.test.ts: Updated for new behavior
- credentials.test.ts: Added JFP_HOME isolation tests
- recommendations.test.ts: Fixed expected category casing

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
